seo.meta_title: Bathroom Remodeling in Lake Charles, LA | Lake Charles Bathroom Remodeling
seo.meta_description: Professional bathroom remodeling in Lake Charles, LA. Licensed & insured. Free estimates. Call (337) 520-8573.

testimonials.name: Sandra M.
testimonials.text: Completely transformed our master bath after Hurricane Laura water damage. Professional crew, finished on time, and the quality is excellent. Would recommend to anyone in Calcasieu Parish.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.text: Used Lake Charles Bathroom Remodeling to convert our tub to a walk-in shower. Price was fair, crew was clean and respectful, and the tile work is flawless. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: Patricia K.
testimonials.text: Called for a free estimate and was impressed by their knowledge. They handled all the permits and finished two weeks ahead of schedule. The bathroom looks like it belongs in a magazine.

faqs.question: How much does a bathroom remodel cost in Lake Charles, LA?
faqs.answer: Bathroom remodels in Lake Charles typically range from $8,000 to $28,000 depending on scope. A basic refresh runs $8,000–$12,000, a mid-range remodel $12,000–$18,000, and a full luxury remodel $18,000–$28,000+. We provide free in-home estimates with no obligation.

faqs.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take?
faqs.answer: Most bathroom remodels take 2–4 weeks from demo to final walkthrough. Simple cosmetic updates can finish in 1–2 weeks. Full gut-and-remodel projects may take 3–5 weeks.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits with the City of Lake Charles?
faqs.answer: Yes — we manage all required permits through the City of Lake Charles and Calcasieu Parish building departments. Our licensed contractors meet all Louisiana code requirements.

faqs.question: Can you remodel a bathroom damaged by a hurricane or flooding?
faqs.answer: Yes — this is one of our most common projects in Calcasieu Parish. We handle full tear-out and rebuild of bathrooms damaged by water intrusion, mold, or structural damage from hurricanes and tropical storms. We document work thoroughly for insurance claims.

faqs.question: Do you serve Sulphur, Westlake, and Moss Bluff?
faqs.answer: Yes — we serve all of Calcasieu Parish including Sulphur, Westlake, Moss Bluff, Iowa, Vinton, DeQuincy, Carlyss, and surrounding communities.
